title: Three held over drugs, ammunition in Plettenberg Bay
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Police have arrested...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Police have arrested three people in Plettenberg Bay after seizing drugs and ammunition over the past weekend. The arrests of the men formed part of operations by police units in the Garden Route District, which resulted in a total of 316 suspects being arrested.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Police have arrested three people in Plettenberg Bay after seizing drugs and ammunition over the past weekend. The arrests of the men formed part of operations by police units in the Garden Route District, which resulted in a total of 316 suspects being arrested."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to a Western Cape Police media statement released earlier today, officers on patrol in Kranshoek near Plettenberg Bay arrested a 27-year-old man yesterday, Sunday 9 June, on a charge of unlawful possession of drugs.","html":"According to a Western Cape Police media statement released earlier today, officers on patrol in Kranshoek near Plettenberg Bay arrested a 27-year-old man yesterday, Sunday 9 June, on a charge of unlawful possession of drugs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Encountering the suspicious-looking man, they searched him and found 22 tik straws, nine halves and 15 quarters of Mandrax tablets in his possession.","html":"Encountering the suspicious-looking man, they searched him and found 22 tik straws, nine halves and 15 quarters of Mandrax tablets in his possession."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The drugs were seized. On Friday, officers of Kwanokuthula in Plettenberg Bay, armed with a search warrant, entered a home in Angola Street, Kwanokuthula, after receiving information from members of the public.","html":"The drugs were seized. On Friday, officers of Kwanokuthula in Plettenberg Bay, armed with a search warrant, entered a home in Angola Street, Kwanokuthula, after receiving information from members of the public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Officers stop and search a vehicle.","html":"Officers stop and search a vehicle."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The officers found 38 rounds of ammunition for a .38 Special revolver in a safe, and a man, the occupant of the home, was unable to provide a licence for the ammunition.","html":"The officers found 38 rounds of ammunition for a .38 Special revolver in a safe, and a man, the occupant of the home, was unable to provide a licence for the ammunition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man (50) was arrested, charged with unlawful possession of ammunition, and the ammunition confiscated. Later on Friday, officers entered a home in Phase 5, Kwanokuthula, where they found and confiscated a small quantity of cocaine. A man (49) was arrested and charged with illegal possession of drugs.","html":"The man (50) was arrested, charged with unlawful possession of ammunition, and the ammunition confiscated. Later on Friday, officers entered a home in Phase 5, Kwanokuthula, where they found and confiscated a small quantity of cocaine. A man (49) was arrested and charged with illegal possession of drugs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"District-wide operationsDuring the operations, which involved stopping and searching vehicles, instituting vehicle checkpoints, and undertaking high-density patrols in crime hotspots, unlicensed liquor outlets were shut down.","html":"District-wide operations
During the operations, which involved stopping and searching vehicles, instituting vehicle checkpoints, and undertaking high-density patrols in crime hotspots, unlicensed liquor outlets were shut down."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The integrated forces arrested a further 78 suspects for drug-related offences, 46 for possession of dangerous weapons, and 20 undocumented persons.","html":"The integrated forces arrested a further 78 suspects for drug-related offences, 46 for possession of dangerous weapons, and 20 undocumented persons."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The other arrests were for minor offences.","html":"The other arrests were for minor offences."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Most of the arrests were executed in Knysna, George and Oudtshoorn.All those arrested are expected to appear in court this week.","html":"Most of the arrests were executed in Knysna, George and Oudtshoorn.
All those arrested are expected to appear in court this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
